title: ZXSpace Controls
description: Understand ZXSpace touch-and-drag cannon movement, continuous auto-fire, horizontal positioning, and practical aiming habits.
summary: ZXSpace control is about smooth cannon movement, lane prediction, and staying ready for alien fire and power-up drops.

sections.heading: Basic input
paragraphs: Drag horizontally to move the cannon along the lower playfield.
The cannon fires automatically, so positioning and timing are the most important skills in long sessions.

sections.heading: Positioning
paragraphs: Keep the cannon under useful firing lanes and move early when the alien formation shifts.
Avoid overcommitting to one side unless a high-value target, power-up, or immediate threat makes it worthwhile.
bullets: Track the formation direction before moving
Stay near lanes with clustered aliens
Leave room to dodge alien fire and collect power-ups

sections.heading: Auto-fire rhythm
paragraphs: Because the cannon fires automatically, good aim comes from staying in the right lane long enough for shots to connect.
Double Laser increases shot coverage for a limited time, making calm positioning even more useful.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSpace controls
featureShowcases.summary: Controls explain how players interact with ZXSpace during active play.
body: This matters because arcade games depend on quick, predictable input. The page keeps the control explanation focused on what players do during a real session.
Players use this page to understand movement, input timing, scoring actions, and any device-specific expectations before chasing higher scores.
bullets: Keeps input guidance close to gameplay.
Supports both first-time players and returning players.
Uses current artwork as a placeholder where dedicated control screenshots are missing.

image.caption: ZXSpace controls artwork supports input and interaction guidance.
